product_overview: A modern, high-performance agency landing site for Morning Star Technology (MS.Tech) that showcases services, portfolio, and provides a contact channel for client inquiries. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase for form handling.
core_goals: Present MS.Tech services and pricing clearly to potential clients
Showcase past projects and tech capabilities to build trust
Provide a reliable contact form to collect leads
Deliver a responsive, accessible, and fast landing experience

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: High-impact landing hero that introduces the brand, surface key stats, and guides visitors to services or contact.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with badge, heading, and subtitle -> View animated stats grid -> View tech stack carousel -> Choose to view services -> Navigate to /services

Navigate to / -> View hero section with badge, heading, and subtitle -> Attempt to interact with tech stack carousel on an unsupported browser -> See static tech stack (no animation) and still be able to read tech names

features.name: Service Packages
features.description: Display of UMKM, Enterprise, and 2.5D website packages with pricing, features, and an expandable coming-soon section to reveal additional offerings.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> View 3 main service cards with pricing and features -> Expand coming soon packages -> View additional package cards -> Select highlighted package to request it -> Navigate to /contact
Navigate to /services -> View 3 main service cards -> Attempt to select a package labeled as coming soon -> See coming soon label and no navigation to contact

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: A contact page that collects name, email, subject, and message and delivers submissions to the backend API, plus contact info cards and social links.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill subject input field -> Fill message textarea -> Submit contact form -> See loading spinner while sending -> See success confirmation message after send
Navigate to /contact -> Fill name input field -> Leave email blank -> Submit contact form -> See validation error indicating required email field

Navigate to /contact -> Fill all form fields -> Submit contact form while NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is not set and backend not running locally -> See error/failure notification indicating message could not be sent

features.name: Portfolio Showcase
features.description: A gallery of completed projects with category badges, descriptions, tech stack badges, and live links where available.
user_flows: Navigate to /portfolio -> View project cards with icon, category badge, and description -> Open a live project link -> External project opens in new tab -> Return to /portfolio -> Choose to start a project -> Navigate to /contact
Navigate to /portfolio -> View project cards -> Attempt to open a project whose link points to a placeholder (#) -> See coming soon or no external navigation

features.name: How We Work Process
features.description: A 6-step timeline that communicates the agency workflow from consultation through maintenance with visual step highlights.
user_flows: Navigate to /how-we-work -> View alternating timeline cards with numbered steps -> Hover over a step circle -> See icon highlight for that step -> Choose to contact now -> Navigate to /contact
Navigate to /how-we-work -> View alternating timeline cards on a touch device -> Attempt to hover over step circles -> See no hover highlight but still be able to read step content

features.name: Mission and Values
features.description: A dedicated page that presents company vision, mission, core values, and a closing quote to convey brand purpose.
user_flows: Navigate to /mission -> View vision and mission cards -> View 4 core values cards -> Read closing quote
Navigate to /mission -> View vision and mission cards -> If assets fail to load due to network issues -> See fallback text content and still read values and quote

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Global navigation bar that enables primary page navigation, logo-based home return, and a mobile hamburger menu for small screens.
user_flows: Navigate to /any-page -> Click logo intent to return home -> Navigate to / -> Click a nav link intent to change page -> Navigate to the target route (use routes listed in the site)
Navigate to /any-page on mobile -> Attempt to open mobile hamburger menu -> If the menu fails to expand on the device, see no menu expansion and remain on the current page

features.name: Footer
features.description: Global footer with company info, internal links, and social icons that link to external profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /any-page -> Scroll to footer -> Click footer link intent to navigate -> Navigate to the linked page or section -> Click a social icon intent to open external profile
Navigate to /any-page -> Scroll to footer -> Click a social icon that is a placeholder (#) -> See no external navigation and encounter a non-functional placeholder link

routes.description: Homepage with hero section, stats grid, and tech stack display
Services page showing pricing packages (UMKM, Enterprise, 2.5D) with toggle for coming soon items
Contact page with form (name, email, subject, message) and contact info cards
Portfolio page showing completed projects with live links
How We Work page with 6-step timeline process
Mission page with vision, mission, values, and quote sections

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Landing page with hero section including badge, heading, subtitle, CTA buttons, stats grid, and tech stack carousel
user_interactions: View hero section with background image and overlay
Click "Lihat Layanan" CTA button to navigate to services
Click "Hubungi Kami" link to navigate to contact
View animated stats grid (Proyek Selesai, Kepuasan Klien, Support, Pengalaman)
View tech stack carousel

features.name: Service Packages
features.description: Display pricing packages for UMKM, Enterprise, and 2.5D Animated websites, with expandable coming soon section
user_interactions: View 3 main service cards with pricing and features
Click "Lihat Semua Layanan" button to expand coming soon packages
Click "Sembunyikan" button to collapse coming soon packages
Click "Pilih Paket Ini" button on highlighted package to go to contact
Click "Konsultasi Gratis" button on other packages to go to contact
Click bottom CTA "Hubungi Kami untuk Konsultasi Gratis" to go to contact

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Contact form that sends messages to the backend API, with contact info cards and social links
user_interactions: Fill name input field
Fill email input field
Fill subject input field
Fill message textarea
Click "Kirim Pesan" submit button
See loading spinner while sending
See success confirmation message after send
Click email contact card to open email client
Click phone contact card to make call
Click WhatsApp contact card to open WhatsApp
Click social media icons (Instagram, LinkedIn, GitHub)

features.name: Portfolio Showcase
features.description: Display portfolio of completed projects with live links and tech stack badges
user_interactions: View project cards with icon, category badge, description
Click "Kunjungi Website" on live projects to open external link
View "Coming Soon" label on projects not yet live
Click "Mulai Proyek Anda" CTA to navigate to contact

features.name: How We Work Process
features.description: 6-step timeline showing the agency workflow from consultation to maintenance
user_interactions: View alternating timeline cards with step numbers
Hover over step circles for icon highlight
Click "Hubungi Kami Sekarang" CTA to navigate to contact

features.name: Mission and Values
features.description: Company mission page with vision/mission cards and core values grid
user_interactions: View vision and mission cards
View 4 core values cards (Modernisasi Digital, Inovasi Teknologi, Pemberdayaan UMKM, Kualitas Premium)
Read closing quote

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Global navbar with logo, page links, and mobile hamburger menu
user_interactions: Click nav links to navigate between pages
Click logo to go to homepage
Open/close mobile hamburger menu

features.name: Footer
features.description: Global footer with company info, links, and social media icons
user_interactions: Click footer links to navigate to pages
Click social media links

known_limitations.issue: Contact form sends to localhost:5000 when NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var is not set
known_limitations.impact: Contact form will fail if backend server is not running locally

known_limitations.issue: Portfolio project links for "Gambar Doeloe" and "Enterprise Dashboard" point to "#"
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot visit those project pages as they are not live yet

known_limitations.issue: Social media links (Instagram, LinkedIn, GitHub) point to "#"
